lines.speaker: Orrvor quo Maten
lines.text: This passage leads to the lair of what your kind call the Alchemical Hydra. It is an ancient beast, the only one of its kind.

lines.speaker: Orrvor quo Maten
lines.text: I am here to protect it. For protecting it will protect the balance. I make sure that only those who have permission can fight it.

lines.speaker: Orrvor quo Maten
lines.text: Only Konar quo Maten can grant permission to fight the Alchemical Hydra. She will rarely grant this permission when the beast needs calming.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any of my items?

lines.speaker: Orrvor quo Maten
lines.text: I do not. If I did have any of your items, but you died before collecting them, they'll now be lost.

lines.speaker: Orrvor quo Maten
lines.text: I do. I suppose you want them back.

lines.speaker: Orrvor quo Maten
lines.text: I don't have anything for you human. If I did have any of your items, but you died before collecting them, they'll now be lost.

sections.title: Attempting to kill the Alchemical Hydra outside of a slayer task

lines.speaker: Orrvor quo Maten
lines.text: Human! To attack that creature would be a threat to the balance. Only those with permission may fight it!

sections.title: Attempting to enter the Alchemical Hydra's lair with items in Orrvor quo Maten's Item Retrieval Service

lines.speaker: Orrvor quo Maten
lines.text: I have some items of yours here human. I'd recommend you collect them before returning to the lair.
